SELECT s.Name AS singer_name, COUNT(sic.concert_ID) AS number_of_concerts
FROM singer s
LEFT JOIN singer_in_concert sic ON s.Singer_ID = sic.Singer_ID
GROUP BY s.Singer_ID, s.Name;
